title: quantity surveyor
description:
Job Description & Requirements

  • The Quantity Surveyor/Quantity Surveyor (Executive) manages and prepares all the cost estimates for the construction projects. This ranges from initial calculations to the final accounts to help in bidding and determining the price of the service. He/She seeks to minimise costs while adhering to the required standards and policies. He/She keeps track of the progression of the contract with regards to any variations. Good communication and negotiation skills are needed for discussion with stakeholders. He/She is responsible for enhancing the overall value of the project while keeping to the standards and policies. He/She is office-based and will go on several site visits and go project sites for certification of progress claim.
  • Allocate work to contractors and subcontractors to facilitate the smooth workflow process.
  • Assess the degree of hazards and risks to ensure workplace safety is maintained.
  • Communicate with the management, contractors and sub-contractors on the adjustments to cost estimates.
  • Conduct the negotiations during the course of the project in order to ensure issues are resolved.
  • Control project scope to meet project objectives in order to enhance project deliverables and key work activities.
  • Develop cost reduction strategies to enhance the overall value of the project.
  • Monitor project costs to ensure the objectives of the project are achieved in accordance to building contract law.
  • Oversee and ensure compliance with standards.
  • Prepare tender and contract documents in accordance to the building and construction regulations.
  • Prepare the cost analysis for the project in order to ensure the overall value is enhanced.
  • Provide advice on contractual claims so that the project scope is managed.

postedCompany.description:
BH Builders & Engineering Pte Ltd was incorporated in 2007 as a private limited company under the laws of Singapore. Our Company is registered with BCA under trade CR03 – Demolition and Workplace Safety Health Council, bizSAFE Star; ISO 45001, ISO 9001 & ISO 14001. Over the years, we have revolved on mixed construction activities including General Building, Civil Engineering Construction and Rental of Excavators and Breakers and supply recycle concrete aggregate.


Our company is engaged in providing specialised and professional services in General Building & Civil Engineering Works.


We have a team of passionate people whom are always striving to provide the most cost effective, timely and quality construction services to our customer. For us, our customers deserved the best.


Our success in securing repeated orders from established Clients is testament to our commitment to quality service and total customer satisfaction. We believe a satisfied customer is our greatest gratification for a job well done.
postedCompany.name: BH BUILDERS & ENGINEERING PTE. LTD.
